text_evidence: GM was forced to implement an immediate facility halt at the assembly and stamping plant, as thousands of hourly workers walked off the job and set up picket lines
Honda's assembly plant was completely submerged, resulting in the destruction of thousands of newly manufactured vehicles and specialized robotic tooling

arguments.facility_location: Rojana Industrial Park, Ayutthaya Province, Thailand

text_evidence: ASML was forced to implement an immediate facility halt at the Berlin site

JBS USA, the North American subsidiary of JBS S.A., immediately executed a total network isolation, forcing several of its key meat processing facilities to implement an immediate and emergency facility halt at its primary facility in Greeley, Colorado, USA
NXP Semiconductors N.V. executed an immediate and orderly facility halt at its Austin fab
Toyota's IT leadership immediately executed a total network isolation, forcing the company to implement an immediate facility halt across all fourteen of its domestic vehicle assembly plants in Japan
database outage meant that personnel could not safely verify cargo manifests
docked at the Port of Bremerhaven in Germany, the vessel operated by Maersk experienced a transit bottleneck
Ever Valiant was forced to drop anchor in the Red Sea, waiting for the blockage to clear
MSC chose to reroute the vessel around the Cape of Good Hope at the southern tip of Africa, adding thousands of nautical miles to the journey
freight train operated by the Canadian Pacific Railway, carrying a critical consignment of high-value timber boards and structural steel rods, was forced to halt in transit
COSCO vessel was unable to secure a docking berth or find available dockworkers to unload its cargo

arguments.facility_location: Port of Los Angeles, California, USA

text_evidence: Recaro Automotive GmbH officially filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection

Delphi Corporation, a spin-off of General Motors and a critical supplier of automotive wiring harnesses, engine control modules, and steering assemblies, officially filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection
Britishvolt officially filed for administration in the High Court of England and Wales, after failing to secure a vital rescue package or emergency funding
OneWeb filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of New York
Carillion plc officially entered compulsory liquidation in the High Court of England and Wales
solar panel manufacturer Solyndra LLC officially filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection
TotalEnergies SE declared force majeure on its fuel product shipments from the Normandy refinery

arguments.cause: union strikes and blockades by CGT union members

text_evidence: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. declared force majeure on its shipments of polyethylene resins and polymer intermediates from the Houston site

arguments.cause: chemical spill and subsequent utility shutdown of a steam cracker unit at the Houston, Texas, facility

text_evidence: Chevron Phillips Chemical Company LLC officially declared force majeure on its polyethylene, polypropylene, and specialty polymer products

arguments.cause: extreme weather forced emergency shutdowns at several of its major manufacturing complexes

text_evidence: BASF SE has declared force majeure on its deliveries of various basic chemicals and plastic intermediates

arguments.cause: explosion and subsequent fire at the northern harbor of the Ludwigshafen site in Germany, resulting in several fatalities, numerous injuries, and the complete destruction of critical raw material supply pipelines

text_evidence: Aurubis AG officially declared force majeure on its supply contracts for copper products and brass alloys manufactured at the Stolberg facility

arguments.cause: severe flooding of the nearby Vichtbach river completely inundated and heavily damaged the Stolberg copper processing plant

text_evidence: Chemours Company was forced to declare force majeure on several of its near-term titanium dioxide shipments

arguments.cause: simultaneous lockout of unionized rail workers by Canadian National Railway and Canadian Pacific Kansas City

text_evidence: United States Department of Commerce officially implemented a tariff change, announcing a permanent twenty-five percent tariff on steel imports originating from Canada and Mexico
United States officially implemented a major tariff change, imposing a twenty-five percent import duty on approximately one and a third billion dollars worth of goods imported directly from France
United States officially implemented a major tariff change under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act, imposing a twenty-five percent import duty on imported steel products
China's Ministry of Commerce officially implemented a major tariff change, imposing a twenty-five percent import tariff on imports of pork products originating from the United States
United States Department of Commerce officially implemented a tariff change, announcing a permanent tariff exemption on steel imports originating from South Korea in exchange for an import quota
EU officials announced a tariff change, imposing temporary countervailing duties of up to thirty-eight percent on imports of battery electric vehicles originating from China
